perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video features a man in a blue vest (Cai Aga) and a person wearing a large, smiling cartoon mask (Da Tou Fo) in a studio setting with light blue curtains and shelves of figurines. (2) Cai Aga points aggressively at the masked person and then at himself, displaying exaggerated angry and excited facial expressions while wearing a vest with 'No. 1 蔡緯嘉' on it. (3) A woman in a pink vest (Li Pei-jie) enters the frame and interacts with the two, appearing to mediate or question them. (4) The masked character gestures while information graphics about service teams and prizes appear on screen. (5) The three individuals stand together at the end, gesturing towards the camera and pointing downwards.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-energy male vocals dominate, speaking in a mix of Mandarin and Taiwanese Hokkien with an excited and comedic tone. (2) Upbeat, quirky electronic background music plays continuously, maintaining a humorous atmosphere. (3) Occasional female vocals join in a questioning and playful tone. (4) Sound effects such as 'dings', impact sounds, and cartoonish whistles are used frequently to punctuate jokes and emphasize text overlays.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the fast-paced dialogue throughout. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Large yellow and white variety-show style captions like '妳看這傢伙!!' (Look at this guy!!), '肖想要參選' (Thinking of running for election), and '笑死人啦' (So funny). (3) Informational Text: '28支營隊' (28 service teams), '服務3800位居民' (Served 3800 residents), '2025/10/26' (Deadline), '每隊5萬元獎金' (50,000 TWD prize per team). (4) Hook Text: '底下連結點起來' (Click the link below) and '好里家社福協會' (Good Village Social Welfare Association).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Comedy skit hook -> Information delivery via 'argument' -> Call to action with all members

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator (Cai Aga), 1 person in a mask, 1 female co-host.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man in a blue election-style vest, a person in a green hoodie with a giant cartoon mask, and a woman in a pink vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor room with light blue curtains, a brown leather sofa, and shelves filled with various toys, figurines (Bearbrick), and Japanese-style artwork.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Exposition -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional advertisement for the 'Good Village Social Welfare Association' (好里家社福協會) scholarship and grant program for student service groups. It uses a comedic 'argument' between popular internet personalities to grab attention before pivoting to factual details about the application deadline, participant requirements, and financial rewards (50,000 TWD and hahababy merchandise).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct promotion of a social welfare grant program and its associated rewards including brand-name clothing.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Cai Aga's signature high-energy shouting, the recurring 'Da Tou Fo' character, and variety-show editing style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the influencer's established comedy brand to make social welfare information more accessible and engaging for a younger, student-aged demographic.
